mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, nickname) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
